title: Ancient Sentinel modifier equals opponent base SPD

card.rawText: This card's Modifier is equal to your opponent's current primary creature's base SPD stat.

effect.value: Modifier equals opponent primary base SPD

plan.title: Ancient Sentinel modifier equals opponent base SPD
plan.summary: Place Ancient Sentinel across from a synthetic SPD 10 primary creature and verify its effective Modifier becomes 10.

notes: Set Ancient Sentinel as player_1 primary.
Set the opponent synthetic primary creature with base SPD 10.

steps: Set Ancient Sentinel as player_1 primary creature.
Set the synthetic creature as player_2 primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Ancient Sentinel Modifier equals opponent base SPD

manualVerification: Confirm the value updates if the opponent primary creature changes.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the numeric Modifier formula only.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Ancient Sentinel's opponent-base-SPD modifier formula.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
